common.betaBanner: Sifa is pre-alpha, and this is basically our live dev server.
common.betaBannerSub: Your profile data is safe in your AT Protocol account, but features and preferences may change before launch. Help build a better networking ecosystem.
common.errorDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

home.title: Sifa
home.subtitle: Professional identity on the AT Protocol. Own your career narrative.
home.comingSoon: Timeline and feed are coming soon.

profile.resetToAtprotoConfirm: This will remove your custom {field} and revert to your AT Protocol profile value.

activity.title: Activity for {handle}
activity.comingSoon: Activity stream is coming soon. This page will show ATproto activity across the open social web.

import.title: Import from LinkedIn
import.subtitle: Bring your professional history to Sifa. Your data is processed entirely in your browser.

upload.heading: Upload your LinkedIn data export
upload.description: Go to LinkedIn > Settings > Data Privacy > "Download larger data archive". Upload the ZIP file you receive (batch 1 arrives in ~10 minutes).
upload.dropZone: Drag and drop your LinkedIn ZIP file here, or click to browse
upload.dropZoneLabel: Drop zone for LinkedIn ZIP file
upload.fileTypeError: Please select a ZIP file (.zip). LinkedIn exports are delivered as ZIP archives.
upload.fileSizeError: File is too large (max 500 MB). Try re-downloading your LinkedIn export.
upload.privacyNote: Your data is processed entirely in your browser. No raw CSV data is sent to our servers.

preview.heading: Review imported data
preview.duplicatesTitle: Some items already exist on your profile
preview.duplicatesBody: {count} {count, plural, one {item matches} other {items match}} your existing profile data and will be overwritten.
preview.newItemsNote: {count} {count, plural, one {item is} other {items are}} new.
preview.removeNote: You can remove items you don't want to import.
preview.existingBody: Importing will replace all existing profile data with the data below. Your profile headline and summary will also be updated.

confirm.writingRecords: Writing {count} records to your Personal Data Server...
confirm.formattingHint: LinkedIn exports strip text formatting. We did a first pass to restore paragraph breaks and bullet points, but some descriptions may still need manual cleanup. Review your profile and edit any sections that look off.

trackRecord.reactionsDesc: Reactions on your posts across AT Protocol apps.
trackRecord.communityDesc: Activity and contributions in Barazo communities.
trackRecord.mutualDesc: Connections you share with this person.
trackRecord.sharedDesc: Employers, education, or projects you have in common.

activityOverview.title: Activity
activityOverview.comingSoon: Activity overview coming soon. This section will show your ATproto activity across the open social web.

profileEdit.title: Edit Profile
profileEdit.pdsExplanation: Your display name and avatar are managed by your AT Protocol identity provider (e.g. Bluesky). To change them, update your profile there and the changes will sync automatically.
profileEdit.headline: Headline
profileEdit.primaryLinkInfo: Your primary link appears on your profile card. In the future, only verified links can be set as primary.
profileEdit.locationApiFailed: Location search is temporarily unavailable. Enter your location manually.
profileEdit.locationApiFailedWithFallback: City and postal code search is temporarily unavailable. You can still select your country using the Country tab.

auth.loginRequiredDescription: You need to sign in to perform this action.
auth.loginRequiredImport: Sign in to import your LinkedIn data.

identityCard.label: Professional identity
identityCard.unclaimedPopupText: This profile shows public AT Protocol data. {name} hasn't set up their Sifa profile yet.

unclaimedBanner.text: This profile shows public AT Protocol data and hasn't been claimed yet.

search.placeholder: Search people by name, skills, or headline

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Sign in with your AT Protocol account.

about.title: About Sifa
about.mission: Sifa is a decentralized professional identity network built on the AT Protocol. Your profile, your data, your choice of provider -- no vendor lock-in.
about.atproto: Built on the AT Protocol, the same open network that powers Bluesky. Your professional identity is portable across any compatible app.
about.openSource: Professional profile lexicons and import tools are open source (MIT). We believe professional identity standards should be open to everyone.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.dataStorageBody: Your professional profile data is stored in your AT Protocol Personal Data Server (PDS), not on Sifa's servers. You control your data and can move it to any compatible provider at any time.
privacy.importBody: When you import data from LinkedIn, the ZIP file is processed entirely in your browser. Raw CSV data never leaves your device. Only the structured profile records are written to your PDS.
privacy.cookiesBody: Sifa uses session cookies for authentication and a theme preference cookie for dark/light mode. We do not use tracking cookies, analytics cookies, or third-party advertising cookies.
privacy.contactBody: For privacy questions, contact us at privacy@sifa.id.

dataTransparency.title: Your data on the AT Protocol
dataTransparency.body: Your professional profile is stored in your Personal Data Server (PDS). This data is public and portable -- you can inspect exactly what is stored and take it to any compatible provider.

embedBuilder.pageDescription: Add a live professional profile card to any website with a single line of code.
embedBuilder.pageSubtitle: Add a live professional profile card to any website with a single line of code.
embedBuilder.enterHandle: Enter a handle or DID to see a preview

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been moved.
notFound.easterEggMessage: You found the secret! Sifa means "praise" in Swahili. Consider yourself praised for your curiosity.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.serviceBody: Sifa provides a web interface for managing professional profiles on the AT Protocol. Your profile data is stored in your PDS, not controlled by Sifa.
terms.accountsBody: You sign in with your existing AT Protocol account. Sifa does not create or manage accounts -- your identity is managed by your PDS provider.
terms.contentBody: You are responsible for the accuracy and legality of the profile information you publish. Sifa may remove content that violates applicable law or community guidelines.
terms.disclaimerBody: Sifa is provided as-is during the beta period. We make no guarantees about uptime or data preservation beyond what the AT Protocol itself provides. Your data in your PDS is under your control regardless of Sifa's availability.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.resetDescription: Remove all your Sifa profile data and start fresh. Your positions, education, skills, and all other profile sections will be deleted from both Sifa and your Personal Data Server. Your AT Protocol account, Bluesky profile, posts, follows, and data from other apps are not affected.
dangerZone.deleteDescription: Remove all your Sifa profile data and sign out. This is the same as resetting your profile, but also ends your session.
dangerZone.deleteModalTitle: Your Sifa account has been deleted.
dangerZone.deleteModalBody: Your AT Protocol account and Personal Data Server still exist. Sifa only removed its own data. If you want to delete your AT Protocol account entirely, visit your PDS provider's settings.
dangerZone.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
